notes: Create, activate, list, get, delete, and repair workspaces keyed by git branch
Workspace status transitions (active, archived) with validation
Git worktree creation and management for workspace isolation
Set active agent per workspace and compile provider configs into worktree
Query provider matrix for a workspace showing compiled providers and their status
Start, progress, end sessions with one active session per workspace
Immutable session records with timestamps, summaries, and progress entries
Session drain mechanism for archiving completed session data
Event-driven workspace state updates on create, activate, compile, archive, and delete
Per-workspace model, cost, MCP, skill, and provider overrides via WorkspaceOverrides
Sync workspace state between local and remote via workspace sync function
Reconcile workspace record against git state on session start — detect worktree moves, stale paths
ship init installs git hook that notifies shipd on branch checkout
